title: P0 fix：日出日落改帶 CountyName+Date 參數查精確日期列，逐日變化正確呈現
environment: Executor: ubuntu-dev mainline worktree at /home/esgcenter0/python/Academic/trip-weather-planner using ~/venvs/python-env

context.background: User verified in live testing that sunrise/sunset shows the IDENTICAL time (05:07/18:48) with 參考 2025-06-29 天文資料 for every selected day — but sunrise genuinely shifts by ~1 minute across a week. Management root-caused it: fetch_sunrise_sunset() calls A-B0062-001 with NO query params (no CountyName, no Date) and a single shared cache key, so CWA returns a default slice starting around 2025-06-29; the exact-date match then always fails and the approximate-nearest-row fallback fires for every request. The earlier tz-fix card's 'exact-date lookup' promise was therefore never effective in live mode.
context.management_verified_fix: Empirically confirmed 2026-07-05 with the live key: GET /api/v1/rest/datastore/A-B0062-001?Authorization=KEY&CountyName=新北市&Date=2026-07-09 returns exactly one row for that county+date with SunRiseTime 05:11 / SunSetTime 18:47 (differs from the stale approximate 05:07/18:48 — proving per-day variation). Response shape: records.locations.location[].{CountyName, time[].{Date, SunRiseTime, SunSetTime, ...}}.

in_scope: X1 fetch_sunrise_sunset passes params CountyName=<town.city> and Date=<target_date ISO> to A-B0062-001; cache key becomes per county+date (e.g. sunrise:{city}:{date}) with a long TTL (astronomical data is static)

X2 parse the returned exact row; is_approximate must be false and source_date equal to the target date on the happy path; keep the tolerant approximate fallback ONLY for genuine upstream gaps (row missing), preserving the honest UI labeling for that rare case
X3 verify per-day variation end-to-end in live mode: two different days in the same week for the same county must return different sunrise times (e.g. 新北市 7/5 vs 7/9)
X4 frontend copy: when is_approximate is false, do not show the 參考 <date> 天文資料 caveat line at all (exact data needs no disclaimer); keep the caveat only for the approximate fallback
X5 tests: adapter builds correct params and cache key; exact-row parsing; fallback path still works when the row is absent; frontend caveat-line visibility by is_approximate
out_of_scope: UV changes (its wording was already settled)
Any other backend or frontend behavior

requirements: R1: Tolerant parsing (.get()/try-except, no hardcoded deep paths) — the 2026-07-06 CWA format change window applies
R2: Mock mode intact: mock_sunrise_sunset already varies by target_date deterministically — do not break it
R3: No regression of pinned 72h chart, day-click switching, or any prior card behavior
R4: English-only code comments; no secrets in tracked files
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: Live mode: for the same county, at least two different days in the current week return different SunRiseTime values, each with is_approximate=false and source_date == target date
AC3: Clicking through the 7 day cards shows per-day sunrise/sunset changes in the UI, with no 參考...天文資料 caveat on exact rows
AC4: Simulated missing-row upstream response still degrades to the approximate fallback with honest labeling (test-level verification)
AC5: Changes committed per-AC and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Live-mode town codes are CWA-sourced (e.g. cwa-65000260); read from live /api/towns before manual testing.
Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; clean up any verification servers afterward.
Exact verified request: A-B0062-001?Authorization=KEY&CountyName=新北市&Date=2026-07-09 → time[0] = {Date: 2026-07-09, SunRiseTime: 05:11, SunSetTime: 18:47}.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Fix sunrise/sunset to query A-B0062 with CountyName+Date so each selected day returns its own exact astronomical times (05:11/18:47 for 新北市 7/9, not the stale 2025-06-29 approximation), cache per county+date, hide the caveat line on exact rows, and keep the honest approximate fallback only for genuine upstream gaps.
next_task_hint: Remaining: deploy auth -> actual public-URL deploy, Gemini decision, submission polish. Deadline 2026-07-06 12:00.
